actions.label: Set Up Business Foundation
actions.description: Open a business account, implement bookkeeping, and set up monthly tax reserves. Separate business and personal money from day one.
actions.narrative_success: Business account open, bookkeeping running, tax reserves set. For the first time, you can answer 'how much did I make?' without guessing.
actions.narrative_failure: The bank wanted more paperwork than expected. But everything's queued — you're set up by next week.

actions.label: Build Personal Credit
actions.description: Improve your credit score through dispute resolution, tradelines, or debt optimization. Choose your approach based on your current situation.
actions.narrative_success: Credit score jumped. Your lending expert says 'You're bankable now.' Next step: use it.
actions.narrative_failure: Progress is slower than expected. One dispute succeeded, others are still fighting. Give it 30 days.

actions.label: Get Income Protection Insurance
actions.description: If you can't work, everything stops. This policy keeps the business running and your family protected for 2+ years.
actions.narrative_success: Policy in force at $150/month. Your family sleeps better. Your accountant approves.
actions.narrative_failure: Application submitted — underwriting wants more medical history. Standard process, should close next month.

actions.label: Build Wealth Policy
actions.description: Universal Life, Indexed Universal Life, or hybrid contract with tax-advantaged cash value. Grows ~7% annually. Borrow against it anytime — no bank approval needed.
actions.narrative_success: Policy active. Your first $500 is growing tax-free at ~7% annually. At $250K+ you unlock passive income through policy loans.
actions.narrative_failure: Underwriting pending — should clear next month.

actions.label: Form LLC
actions.description: Legal separation between you and the business. Protects personal assets and looks professional to lenders.
actions.narrative_success: LLC filed. EIN issued. Your business is now its own legal person. Personal assets have a wall around them.
actions.narrative_failure: Filed successfully but registered agent setup took longer. Resolved within two weeks.

actions.label: Manage Debt Strategy
actions.description: Choose your approach: Pay Down Hard (direct reduction), Consolidate (0% balance transfer), or Restructure (swap revolving to installment with expert).
actions.narrative_success: Debt down. Credit score up. The utilization improvement is already showing in your credit profile.
actions.narrative_failure: Partial progress. One strategy worked better than expected. Keep momentum going.

actions.label: Apply for Credit
actions.description: Get approved for a personal loan, business credit line, or 0% business card. Varies by your stats and which you qualify for.
actions.narrative_success: Approved. $10K-$15K depending on your profile. Cash available by Friday. Utilization impact is immediate.
actions.narrative_failure: Declined. DTI is borderline or history is too short. Pay down some debt and reapply in 3 months.

actions.label: Hire Fractional CFO
actions.description: A part-time CFO handles payroll, tax planning, banker relationships, and financial strategy. They do what you've been winging.
actions.narrative_success: Your CFO restructured two loan terms, found $3K in unnecessary expenses, and set up your payroll. Month one ROI is already $8K.
actions.narrative_failure: Onboarding is taking longer — your books were messier than expected. But she's cleaning them up and you trust her trajectory.

actions.label: S-Corp Election
actions.description: Restructure to save on self-employment tax. Your accountant has been telling you to do this for a year.
actions.narrative_success: Election filed. Your tax advisor estimates $8K-$12K in annual savings. 'You should've done this two years ago,' she said.
actions.narrative_failure: Filed successfully. Accountant's estimate was optimistic — savings are real but smaller than projected. Still worth it.

actions.label: Key-Man Insurance
actions.description: If you get hit by a bus tomorrow, the business has a $500K safety net to hire your replacement and survive the transition.
actions.narrative_success: Policy in force. $500K if something happens to you. Your family and team are protected.
actions.narrative_failure: Application submitted — health underwriting flagged a question. Should clear within 4 weeks.

actions.label: Deploy Capital
actions.description: Choose your passive income path: Buy Income Property (real estate, monthly cashflow + appreciation) or Become Private Lender (deploy capital at 8-15% returns).
actions.narrative_success: Keys in hand. The duplex cash-flows $700/month after mortgage and expenses. Passive income is real now.
actions.narrative_failure: Property closed but inspection found issues. Repairs eat into projections. Still cash-flows, just slower to profitability.

actions.label: Build Asset Protection Stack
actions.description: Layer irrevocable trust, umbrella policy, and entity structure so lawsuits hit the operating company, not your accumulated personal wealth.
actions.narrative_success: The attorney delivered the trust documents. Your assets are now shielded by entities that don't have your name on the door. Bulletproof.
actions.narrative_failure: The basic structure is in place but full trust setup needs more iteration. You're partially protected.
